name: Review System
description: Review submission flow for marketplace transactions. Allows buyers to rate, write text reviews, and upload photos after a completed booking.

page_briefs.write-review: Guided review submission form anchored to a specific booking. Top section shows a compact booking summary card with listing thumbnail and dates. Form sections include star rating selectors for overall and category scores, a text area for the written review, a photo upload dropzone, and a submit button with preview toggle.

shells.sidebar-main: Sidebar navigation with main content area

directives: Write-review form MUST collect: 1-5 star rating (required) + headline (single line) + body (multiline) + optional photos. Stars first, headline second, body third — NOT a free-form textarea-only form.

Star rating control: 5 horizontal stars, click to select. Selected stars filled in accent. Hovering pre-fills up to that star (so 4-star hover shows 4 stars filled). Show a small label below ('Excellent', 'Good', 'OK', 'Disappointing', 'Bad') keyed to the rating count.
Photo upload: small thumbnail strip below the body field. Each thumbnail shows a remove button on hover. Drag-drop into the strip, OR click 'Add photo' to file-pick. Maximum 6 photos.
Review submission MUST show a confirmation state — 'Thanks! Your review is now public.' — not a silent navigation away. Include a 'View your review' link.
Form validation is friendly: empty stars → 'Tap to rate', empty body → 'Tell other guests what you loved'. Avoid 'This field is required'.
